component.name: Fred TV Plus

description.p: Fred TV Plus is a fork of Fred TV with additional features. A fast and powerful IPTV application built with Tauri and Angular.

ul.li: Import IPTV channels from any source (M3U File, M3U link, Xtream)
Control the UI from a TV remote
Super low RAM usage and instant search

description.p: Fred TV Plus personal fork with additional GUI features.

component.developer_name: John (based on Fred TV by Frédéric Lachapelle)
